code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API 
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API   
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Decrypt and validate request and create session    
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Checks if account with email already exists
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing suspension=false & passwordReset=false & blocked=false
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "no account intervention" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Validates that no intervention is required
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates if password is correct
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-recovery (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Calculates whether account recovery is permitted
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountRecovery.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /verify-mfa-code (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Validates whether Auth App MFA code is valid
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: 204 response 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /orch-auth-code (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates and store Authorization Code with 5 min TTL
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AuthCodeResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> orch_api : Authorisation response via to /orchestration-redirect URL
    orch_api ->> auth_external_api: Token request to /token (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    auth_external_api ->> auth_external_api : Validates token request, then generates and stores access token with 3 min TTL
    auth_external_api ->> orch_api : Token response containing access token
    orch_api ->> auth_external_api: Userinfo request to /userinfo (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    auth_external_api ->> auth_external_api: Returns authenticated level, internal pairwise and other details
    auth_external_api ->> orch_api : Userinfo response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的OAuth 2.0授权流程时序图，核心是用户从Orchestration层进入，经过前端认证，最后拿到token。整个流程要覆盖IoT工业场景里的边缘节点、MQTT Broker、PLC逻辑这些组件的映射。
明白，我先确认一下参与者结构。您提到Orchestration作为入口，然后是Authentication Frontend，后面还需要Authentication External API和Internal API对吗？另外Account Interventions API是独立服务？
对的，五个参与者。Orchestration负责302重定向到前端的/authorize端点，这个跳转要标清楚。然后前端自己要先做解密验证和session创建。
elements_involved: Decrypt and validate request and create session

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 好，参与者列好了，第一步重定向也画上了。接下来前端调用Internal API的/start，这里您标注了IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，是说这个请求对应边缘节点的处理逻辑？
没错，EdgeNode负责计算当前状态，返回StartResponse对象。然后前端的状态机根据这个响应决定用户流向。
elements_involved: State machine works out where to send user based on start response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 接下来应该是检查用户是否存在吧？我看到/user-exists调用，同样映射到EdgeNode。然后前端验证账户已存在。
elements_involved: Validates that the user already has an account

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，但这里有个关键分支——account interventions检查。这个调用走MQTT Broker映射，Internal API会转发到Account Interventions API，返回suspension、passwordReset、blocked这些状态。
画好了，interventions返回都是false，然后Internal API生成审计事件，返回AccountInterventions对象。前端验证无干预后继续。
elements_involved: Response from Account Interventions containing suspension=false & passwordReset=false & blocked=false
Generates audit event for "no account intervention" Account Intervention
Validates that no intervention is required

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 接下来是/login请求，同样走MQTT Broker映射，Internal API验证密码正确性，返回LoginResponse。
这里确认一下，account-recovery调用映射到TelemetryStream，是检查账户恢复是否被允许？
elements_involved: Calculates whether account recovery is permitted

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 是的，返回AccountRecovery对象。然后是MFA验证，走PLC Logic映射，验证Auth App的MFA code，返回204。
elements_involved: Validates whether Auth App MFA code is valid

cscw_dialogue.utterance: MFA验证通过。接下来是/orch-auth-code，映射到ActuatorController，生成5分钟TTL的授权码。
elements_involved: Generates and store Authorization Code with 5 min TTL

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 对，然后前端把授权码通过/orchestration-redirect返回给Orchestration层。到这里前端的工作就结束了。
后端token流程我来补充。Orchestration向External API的/token端点请求，走PLC Logic映射，生成3分钟TTL的access token。
elements_involved: Validates token request, then generates and stores access token with 3 min TTL

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 没错，最后还有userinfo请求，同样走PLC Logic，返回认证级别、internal pairwise这些信息。
elements_involved: Returns authenticated level, internal pairwise and other details

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 整个流程画完了。我检查一下：从Orchestration重定向开始，经过前端的多轮内部API调用（EdgeNode、MQTT Broker、TelemetryStream、ActuatorController映射），回到Orchestration，再走后端External API的token和userinfo（PLC Logic映射）。

等等，account interventions那里有个问题。Internal API转发到Account Interventions API的时候，标注的映射应该是EdgeNode，不是MQTT Broker。让我再确认——不对，请求路径是/account-interventions，映射到MQTT Broker是对的，但转发到Account Interventions API的标注应该是EdgeNode。你画的是对的，我刚才看错了。
确认一下：/account-interventions这个端点调用映射到MQTT Broker，然后Internal API内部转发到Account Interventions API服务，这个转发动作映射到EdgeNode。理解正确吗？
正确。另外我注意到/start和/user-exists都是EdgeNode，但/account-interventions的请求方标注是MQTT Broker，这是故意区分的，因为interventions涉及消息队列的异步特性。
还有一个细节：verify-mfa-code和token、userinfo都映射到PLC Logic，这是说MFA验证和token生成都是PLC控制的实时逻辑？而account-recovery走TelemetryStream是流式数据处理？
完全正确。PLC Logic处理的是硬实时控制流，TelemetryStream处理的是可容忍延迟的恢复策略计算。这样整个IoT工业场景的映射就一致了。图可以定稿了。
